items.title: One anti-war critic fined, another held as Russia clamps down on opponents
items.dek: While Boris Nadezhdin is barred from running for parliament, blogger Ilya Remeslo is remanded in custody.
items.body: While Boris Nadezhdin is barred from running for parliament, blogger Ilya Remeslo is remanded in custody.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Minister clears path for Israel's ‘Alligator Alcatraz’ for Palestinians despite legal warnings
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
items.dek: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.
items.body: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.
items.author: IriLine Desk
